texto: I keep seeing this ad on TV. It talks about teachers. Thank you for teaching me. Thank you for changing my life. They all look happy. Have they always been this happy? Did they have a perfect childhood? A perfect school life? I was happy once. But I was young. The older you get, the more you remember. The younger you are, the more you forget.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Haresh Sharma que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “I keep seeing this ad on TV. It talks about teachers. Thank you for teaching me. Thank you for ch…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre educacao, haresh-sharma, play, com foco em play e school.
